message:
feat(algorithms): add same-node connectivity/cut variants and improve directed global connectivity

Directed Node Connectivity:
- Refactor node_connectivity_directed() to use BFS-based local flow
  instead of full auxiliary graph construction for source≠sink case
- Add node_connectivity_directed_same_node() for self-connectivity
  queries using node-split auxiliary graph
- Fix node_connectivity_directed_global() to properly handle neighbor
  pairs: use indexed iteration to avoid HashSet→Vec conversion overhead,
  dispatch same-node queries to dedicated function

Minimum Node Cut:
- Add minimum_node_cut_directed_same_node() implementing BFS reachability
  on residual graph after max-flow to find cut nodes separating a node
  from itself (identifies nodes whose removal disconnects cycles through
  that node)

Global Connectivity:
- Fix min_value formatting (multi-line if/else for clarity)
- Collect neighbors into both HashSet (for O(1) lookup) and Vec
  (for deterministic iteration) to avoid redundant conversion

Python Bindings:
- Refactor algorithm exports for cleaner organization (~560 lines
  rearranged with no net API changes)

Tests:
- Add test_connectivity.py with 50+ lines of directed connectivity
  and cut tests
- Update graph metrics expansion tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,17 @@ def test_node_connectivity_directed(self, fnx, nx):
 
         assert fnx.node_connectivity(D_fnx) == nx.node_connectivity(D_nx)
 
+    def test_node_connectivity_directed_cycle_tiebreak(self, fnx, nx):
+        D_fnx = fnx.DiGraph()
+        D_fnx.add_edge(0, 1)
+        D_fnx.add_edge(1, 0)
+
+        D_nx = nx.DiGraph()
+        D_nx.add_edge(0, 1)
+        D_nx.add_edge(1, 0)
+
+        assert fnx.node_connectivity(D_fnx) == nx.node_connectivity(D_nx)
+
     def test_minimum_node_cut_directed(self, fnx, nx):
         D_fnx = fnx.DiGraph()
         D_fnx.add_edge(0, 1)
@@ -54,6 +65,45 @@ def test_minimum_node_cut_directed(self, fnx, nx):
 
         assert_sets_equal(fnx.minimum_node_cut(D_fnx), nx.minimum_node_cut(D_nx))
 
+    def test_minimum_node_cut_directed_cycle_tiebreak(self, fnx, nx):
+        D_fnx = fnx.DiGraph()
+        D_fnx.add_edge(0, 1)
+        D_fnx.add_edge(1, 0)
+
+        D_nx = nx.DiGraph()
+        D_nx.add_edge(0, 1)
+        D_nx.add_edge(1, 0)
+
+        assert_sets_equal(fnx.minimum_node_cut(D_fnx), nx.minimum_node_cut(D_nx))
+
+    def test_minimum_node_cut_disconnected_raises(self, fnx, nx):
+        G_fnx = fnx.Graph()
+        G_fnx.add_node(0)
+        G_fnx.add_node(1)
+
+        G_nx = nx.Graph()
+        G_nx.add_node(0)
+        G_nx.add_node(1)
+
+        with pytest.raises(nx.NetworkXError):
+            nx.minimum_node_cut(G_nx)
+        with pytest.raises(fnx.NetworkXError):
+            fnx.minimum_node_cut(G_fnx)
+
+    def test_minimum_node_cut_directed_disconnected_raises(self, fnx, nx):
+        D_fnx = fnx.DiGraph()
+        D_fnx.add_edge(0, 1)
+        D_fnx.add_node(2)
+
+        D_nx = nx.DiGraph()
+        D_nx.add_edge(0, 1)
+        D_nx.add_node(2)
+
+        with pytest.raises(nx.NetworkXError):
+            nx.minimum_node_cut(D_nx)
+        with pytest.raises(fnx.NetworkXError):
+            fnx.minimum_node_cut(D_fnx)
+
     def test_edge_connectivity_directed(self, fnx, nx):
         D_fnx = fnx.DiGraph()
         D_fnx.add_edge(0, 1)
